name: Panther Chameleon
llmPolicy: Rule-based local placeholder only; future LLM drafts must use provided facts and open review artifacts, never publish directly.
providedFacts: The panther chameleon is a species of chameleon found in the eastern and northern parts of Madagascar in a tropical forest biome.
Additionally, it has been introduced to Réunion and Mauritius, as well as the state of Florida within the United States.
captionOptions: Panther Chameleon has a colorful trick to notice.
